question.level1: I can upgrade your greenhouse for 30,000g, 250 Wood, and 200 Stone. Are you interested?
question.level2: I can expand your greenhouse for 50,000g, 300 Wood, and 100 Hardwood. Are you interested?
question.level3: I can add a basement to your greenhouse for 80,000g, 500 Stone, and 150 Hardwood. Are you interested?
error.not_enough_gold: You don't have enough gold for this upgrade!
error.not_enough_materials: You don't have enough materials in your inventory!
success.upgrade_started: Great! I'll start working on your greenhouse tomorrow. It will take 3 days.
menu.greeting: What can I do for you?
